title: PEBEO 97812 ACRYLIC 59ML MATT PINK, 3.3 x 3.3 x 10 cm
features: Permanent on wood, plaster, paper and canvas
Ideal for journaling, art therapy, cardmaking, wood and canvas work
description: From the manufacturer Pébéo ACRYLIC PAINT – Fluid & Opaque Acrylic Paint Bring your ideas to life with Pébéo Acrylic Paint , a fluid, highly pigmented, and permanent acrylic paint . Thanks to its multi-surface adhesion and wide colour range, it’s the perfect paint for artists, hobbyists, and crafters. Unlimited Creative Possibilities 85 colours – all intermixable to create your own shades. 3 finishes – matte, gloss, and pearlescent to suit every project. 59 ml bottle – convenient size for both beginners and professionals. Creative Effects with Pébéo Mediums Take your art further with Pébéo auxiliaries: Pearlescent medium – adds shimmering, nacre-like highlights. Crackling medium – creates natural crackled effects on matte colours. Protective varnishes – matte, gloss, or glitter to extend the durability of your creations. How to Use Shake or stir well before use. Apply directly on the chosen surface or with your preferred tool. Dilute with water if necessary. Once dry, protect your work with Pébéo varnish for a lasting finish. Why Choose Pébéo Acrylic Paint? ✔️ Multi-surface – one paint for all your creative projects. ✔️ High pigmentation – intense and vivid colours. ✔️ Versatile finishes – matte, gloss, or pearlescent. ✔️ Quick drying – dust-free in 30 minutes. ✔️ Professional quality, accessible to all – trusted Pébéo expertise. Unlimited Creative Possibilities Creative Effects with Pébéo Mediums How to Use Why Choose Pébéo Acrylic Paint? Technical Features Base Water-based Opacity Opaque & permanent Surfaces Wood, plaster, terracotta, cardboard, and more Application tools Brush, roller, sponge, stencil, directly from the bottle, texture combs, stamps Drying time Touch dry: 30 min / Fully cured: 24 h Coverage 59 ml ≈ 0.6 m² Dilution With water if needed Cleaning Easy clean-up with water Protection 3 varnishes: matte, gloss, glitter Storage Protect from frost and heat
